name: Tumbleweed
author: Mike Zapawa (2020) / AGP port
description: Mike Zapawa's modern hex influence/area game. Each turn place a stack of your colour on any hex; its height equals the number of your stacks that have line-of-sight to it, and it must be strictly taller than whatever is already there (so you settle, grow, or capture). Most hexes controlled at the end wins.
